jobs.title: Expression of Interest - International School of Ticino
jobs.description:
Inspired Education is the leading global group of premium schools, with a portfolio of 121 premium private schools spanning 6 continents which utilise proven educational practices from every corner of the globe, ensuring over 95,000 students receive a world-class learning experience from Kindergarten to Year 13.

The International School of Ticino (IST) is part of the Inspired Education Group, one of the world's leading premium school groups. Located in Lugano, IST offers a stimulating international learning environment in Ticino.

jobs.title: History Teacher
jobs.description:
Inspired Education is the leading global group of premium schools, with a portfolio of 126 premium private schools spanning 6 continents which utilise proven educational practices from every corner of the globe, ensuring over 95,000 students receive a world-class learning experience from Kindergarten to Year 13.

The International School of Ticino (IST) is part of the Inspired Education Group, one of the world's leading premium school groups. Located in Lugano, IST offers a stimulating international learning environment in Ticino.

descriptionByLocale.en: Inspired Education is the leading global group of premium schools, with a portfolio of 126 premium private schools spanning 6 continents which utilise proven educational practices from every corner of the globe, ensuring over 95,000 students receive a world-class learning experience from Kindergarten to Year 13. The International School of Ticino (IST) is part of the Inspired Education Group, one of the world's leading premium school groups. Located in Lugano, IST offers a stimulating international learning environment in Ticino.
descriptionByLocale.it: Inspired Education è il principale gruppo globale di scuole premium, con un portafoglio di 126 scuole private premium distribuite su 6 continenti che utilizzano pratiche educative comprovate da ogni angolo del mondo, garantendo a oltre 95.000 studenti un'esperienza di apprendimento di livello mondiale dalla scuola materna al Year 13. La International School of Ticino (IST) fa parte del gruppo Inspired Education, uno dei principali gruppi di scuole premium al mondo. Situata a Lugano, IST offre un ambiente di apprendimento internazionale stimolante nel Ticino.
descriptionByLocale.de: Inspired Education ist die führende globale Gruppe von Premium-Schulen mit einem Portfolio von 126 privaten Premium-Schulen auf 6 Kontinenten, die bewährte pädagogische Praktiken aus allen Ecken der Welt nutzen und so über 95.000 Schülern eine erstklassige Lernerfahrung vom Kindergarten bis zur Jahrgangsstufe 13 bieten. Die International School of Ticino (IST) ist Teil der Inspired Education Group, einer der weltweit führenden Premium-Schulgruppen. Die Schule befindet sich in Lugano und bietet eine anregende internationale Lernumgebung im Tessin.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Inspired Education est le principal groupe mondial d'écoles premium, avec un portefeuille de 126 écoles privées premium réparties sur 6 continents qui utilisent des pratiques éducatives éprouvées provenant de tous les coins du monde, garantissant à plus de 95 000 élèves une expérience d'apprentissage de classe mondiale, de la maternelle à l'année 13. L'International School of Ticino (IST) fait partie du groupe Inspired Education, l'un des principaux groupes d'écoles premium au monde. Située à Lugano, l'IST offre un environnement d'apprentissage international stimulant au Tessin.
